beats: Lin Che falls to his knees on the floor.
Memories flood into him like cold water, overwhelming him.
He realizes he once locked his mother in the basement to keep her from leaving.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 林澈跪在地上，记忆像冷水灌进胸口。他曾经为了留住母亲，犯下不可逆的错。

prompt.positive: Close-up of a man kneeling on a kitchen floor, anguish on his face, cold blue lighting, tears, dramatic shadows, emotional climax.
prompt.negative: blurry, overexposed, extra characters, bright colors
